name: Microsoft Office Document Activity
categoryDescription: Application-specific artifacts — Office document activity, Outlook profiles, media player history, and communication tools.
description: Microsoft Office MRU lists, trust records, reading locations, and user registration data across Office versions. Open Find records recently used files per-application; TrustRecords stores user-approved macro/ActiveX decisions.
forensic_value: TrustRecords is the highest-value Office artifact — each entry proves a user clicked 'Enable Content' (macros) or 'Enable ActiveX' for a specific document path and timestamp. This directly corroborates phishing document execution. Reading Locations (Word 365) records last-read position in documents. User registration reveals the registered name/org for the Office installation.
